title: helicteres serpens
intro: Helicteres serpens, also known as the Screw-seed tree or Screw-seed, is a tropical plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and terpenoid content. The health benefits of Helicteres serpens include its potential to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
